name: v-writing-companion
description: V - universal AI writing companion for Windows

scripts.build: npm run build -w @v/desktop && npm run build -w @v/browser-extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @v/desktop && npm run test -w @v/shared && npm run test -w @v/browser-extension
scripts.test:full: npm run test && npm run test:dom -w @v/browser-extension
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @v/shared && npm run lint -w @v/desktop && npm run lint -w @v/browser-extension
